svg.text: crawloop — self-heal demo · offline · no API key

g.text: ▸ STEP 1 — crawler v1 is live, serving the listing
A Light in the Attic £51.77 · Soumission £50.10 · Tipping the Velvet £53.74
▸ STEP 2 — the site is redesigned overnight
v1 now matches nothing → in a normal pipeline this is a silent outage
▸ STEP 3 — engine detects DRIFT: serve now, heal in the background
Records returned during the redesign — correct, no outage
source=fallback (an LLM read the raw HTML and served this request NOW)
loop: wrote → sandboxed → validated → promoted → v2 ✓
▸ STEP 4 — healed: the self-written v2 serves the new layout
A Light in the Attic · Sharp Objects · Soumission · Tipping the Velvet
source=registry v2 · model calls = 0 FREE AGAIN
break → serve through it → regenerate → run free again.
no network · no API key · 100% deterministic · self-healing · $0/page steady state
